input:
Alice: Finished the user authentication API endpoint yesterday. Today I'm starting frontend forms. I'm blocked by the staging environment still being down.

Bob: Wrapped up the database migration. Tests are passing. Starting performance optimization next.

actions.task: Restore staging environment

input:
Carol: Yesterday merged the redesign components. Today working on responsive layouts. Everything's on track.

Dave: Code review is blocking me. Still waiting on feedback from the senior engineer.

blockers.description: Waiting for code review feedback from senior engineer

actions.task: Provide code review feedback

input:
Eve: Completed unit tests for the payment module. Integrated with Stripe yesterday. Today will do integration testing.

Frank: Documentation for the API is almost done. Should be finished tomorrow.

Grace: Testing the payment flow. Found a bug in the refund logic. Need to fix it before we can move forward.

blockers.description: Bug found in refund logic - blocking payment flow testing

actions.task: Fix refund logic bug

input:
Henry: Finished the dashboard UI mockups. Presenting them to the product team today for feedback.

Iris: Infrastructure setup is blocked. We're still waiting for cloud credentials from IT.

Jack: Backend API is ready for testing.

blockers.description: Cloud credentials not yet received from IT - blocking infrastructure setup

actions.task: Request and provision cloud credentials

input:
Karen: Pulled all user data for analytics. Started building the dashboard queries. Stuck because the database schema documentation is incomplete.

Leo: Reviewed Karen's data extraction. Looking good. Can help fill in the schema gaps.

blockers.description: Database schema documentation is incomplete - blocking dashboard queries

actions.task: Complete database schema documentation

input:
Mona: Fixed three critical bugs in the checkout flow. Updated tests accordingly. Ready for QA.

Nate: QA testing the checkout. Found one more edge case we didn't account for. Need dev to review.

Olivia: Mobile app compilation is broken. Need help from the build team. This is holding everything up.

done: Three critical bugs fixed in checkout flow

blockers.description: Edge case found in checkout flow - needs developer review
Mobile app compilation broken - blocking all mobile work

actions.task: Review and fix checkout edge case
Debug mobile app build failure

input:
Peter: Deployed the authentication service to production yesterday. No issues so far. Monitoring logs.

Quinn: Analytics pipeline is live. Processing events without errors.

Ruth: Customer onboarding flow needs to be tested end-to-end but can't do it because the staging environment got reset.

blockers.description: Staging environment was reset - blocking end-to-end testing of onboarding flow

actions.task: Restore staging environment from backup

input:
Sam: Rewrote the caching layer for better performance. Benchmarks show 40% improvement. Ready for code review.

Tara: Reviewing Sam's cache rewrite. Two optimization suggestions. Will send feedback by EOD.

Uma: The monitoring dashboard still isn't showing real-time metrics. Data is 5 minutes delayed.

done: Caching layer rewritten with 40% performance improvement

actions.task: Address monitoring dashboard latency

input:
Vera: Started implementing the notification system. Sent draft design to the team for review.

Wayne: Waiting for Vera's design before I can start the backend notifications service.

Xander: Documentation for the SDK is 50% done. Should have it complete by Thursday.

in_progress: Notification system design (draft sent for review)

blockers.description: Waiting for notification system design approval before starting backend service

actions.task: Review and approve notification system design

input:
Yara: Successfully migrated legacy database to new architecture. Verified data integrity. 100,000 records migrated without loss.
    
Zoe: Running final stress tests on the migration. Everything looks stable.

Alex: The old API endpoints are still being used by third-party clients. We can't deprecate them yet. Need to notify all API consumers first.

Bella: Risk: if we remove old endpoints without notice, we could break integrations. Recommend 90-day deprecation window.

done: Legacy database migration to new architecture

actions.task: Notify all API consumers about endpoint deprecation
Establish 90-day deprecation window for old API endpoints
actions.deadline: decision needed by end of week

note: Edge case: one sentence contains both Done and In Progress. Agent must split clauses.
input:
Jana: Finished implementing the search feature and now working on unit tests for it.

Martin: Completed the login page and moved on to the signup flow.

note: Edge case: 'PR is up for review' means the PR was created = Done, not In Progress.
input:
Nina: PR is up for review on the login component. Starting on the signup flow today.

Oscar: Submitted the database schema changes for review. Now working on the seed data scripts.

done: Login component PR submitted for review
Database schema changes submitted for review

note: Edge case: 'almost done' and 'should finish today' must be In Progress, not Done.
input:
Paula: Almost done with the API refactor, should finish today. Nothing blocking me.

Rafael: Nearly finished the test suite migration. One more test file to go, will wrap up this afternoon.

in_progress: Test suite migration (nearly complete, one file remaining)

note: Happy path: everything going well, no blockers, no actions needed.
input:
Sara: Deployed a hotfix yesterday. Working on the next feature today. All good.

Tomas: Reviewing PRs from yesterday. Starting on the user settings page after.

note: Edge case: only one person speaking.
input: Rachel: Yesterday finished migrating the tests to Jest. Today starting on E2E test setup with Playwright. No blockers.

note: Edge case: first day of sprint, everyone starting new tasks, done list is empty.
input:
Stefan: Starting on the new notification feature today. Haven't touched it yet, scoping this morning.

Tina: Just assigned to the API performance ticket. Starting investigation today.

Ursula: Beginning work on mobile push notifications. Setting up dev environment first.

in_progress: Mobile push notifications dev environment setup

note: Blocker caused by external party (vendor/client), not internal team.
input:
Victor: Can't proceed with the Salesforce integration. Their API documentation is outdated and their support team hasn't responded in 3 days.

Wendy: Built the data connector on our side. Waiting for Victor's Salesforce work to test end-to-end.

blockers.description: Salesforce API documentation outdated and support unresponsive for 3 days - blocking integration

actions.task: Escalate Salesforce support ticket

note: Edge case: blocker mentioned but already resolved this morning. Should not appear in blockers.
input:
Xenia: The database connection issue that was blocking me yesterday is fixed now. Deployed to staging this morning. Starting on load testing today.

Ylan: Reviewed Xenia's fix. Looks solid. I'm continuing work on the reporting module.

done: Database connection issue fixed and deployed to staging

note: Multiple people affected by the same blocker (CI pipeline down).
input:
Yuri: CI pipeline has been down since last night. Can't deploy anything.

Zara: Same issue here - CI is down. All our PRs are stuck in queue.

Adrian: Also blocked by CI. Doing code review in the meantime to stay productive.

in_progress: Code review (Adrian, while CI is down)

blockers.description: CI pipeline down since last night - blocking all deployments and PR merges

actions.task: Fix CI pipeline

note: Production incident during standup. Urgent escalation needed.
input:
Beth: Production is down. Database ran out of disk space at 3am. I cleared old logs to buy us 30 minutes but we need a proper fix. Need DBA help urgently.

Chris: I've already paged the DBA team. Also drafting the incident report.

done: Temporary fix applied - cleared old logs to restore production

blockers.description: Production database out of disk space - site down, 30-minute window remaining

actions.task: DBA team to implement permanent disk space fix

note: Edge case: update references previous day with no new done items.
input:
Diana: Same as yesterday - still working on the billing module refactor. Making good progress, should wrap up by EOD tomorrow.

Evan: Reviewing Diana's billing code. Three more files to go.

in_progress: Billing module refactor (expected completion: tomorrow EOD)
Code review of billing module (3 files remaining)

note: Edge case: blocker stated as 'can't test until X' without the word 'blocked'.
input:
Fiona: Finished the backend for the checkout feature. Can't test end-to-end until the payment gateway credentials are set up in the test environment.

Gareth: I can set up those credentials. Will do it this afternoon.

blockers.description: Payment gateway credentials not configured in test environment - blocking end-to-end checkout testing

actions.task: Set up payment gateway credentials in test environment

note: Async standup format with Yesterday/Today/Blockers structure.
input:
Greg (async): Yesterday: Completed data pipeline refactor. Today: Starting on the new reporting module. Blockers: None.

Heidi (async): Yesterday: PR reviews. Today: Continuing dashboard optimization. Blockers: None.

note: Sprint end / demo preparation scenario.
input:
Ivan: Demo is tomorrow. Yesterday polished the UI. Today finishing the last two demo flows: the export feature and the onboarding tour.

Julia: Recording a backup demo video in case of technical issues during the live demo.

note: Technical infrastructure standup with Kubernetes, Terraform, etc.
input:
Kevin: Kubernetes cluster scaling issues resolved. Updated HPA configuration, pods now auto-scale correctly under load.

Laura: Still troubleshooting the Terraform state lock. Remote backend is stuck. Need DevOps to manually unlock it.

done: Kubernetes HPA configuration fix - pods auto-scaling correctly

blockers.description: Terraform remote backend stuck in state lock - blocking all infrastructure changes

actions.task: Manually unlock Terraform remote backend state

note: Blocker is an unresolved internal decision, not a technical issue.
input:
Mike: Authentication implementation is done. But we're waiting for the team to decide between JWT and sessions before I can integrate it into the app.

Nancy: Same blocker for me on the mobile side. We're both stuck until this gets decided.

blockers.description: Architecture decision needed: JWT vs sessions - blocking auth integration for both web and mobile

actions.task: Make JWT vs sessions architecture decision

note: Risk flagged (low velocity) but no hard blocker. Actions needed to recover.
input:
Oliver: Just a heads up - we've completed 8 of 21 story points with only 3 days left in the sprint. We might not hit the goal.

Paula: I have some capacity. I can pick up some of Oliver's tickets if we need to rebalance.

actions.task: Review sprint commitments and reassign tickets to recover velocity
Paula to pick up Oliver's tickets if sprint goal is at risk

note: New joiner missing access - classic implicit blocker.
input:
Quincy (first week): Still setting up my dev environment. I'm missing access to the production database and the Jira board. Can't get started without those.

Rosa: I'm helping Quincy with onboarding. Going through the code review process with him today.

in_progress: Onboarding and code review process walkthrough (Rosa and Quincy)

blockers.description: Quincy missing access to production database and Jira board - blocking onboarding

actions.task: Grant Quincy access to production database and Jira

note: Everything going smoothly. Short, simple standup.
input:
Steve: Finished the login page styling. Today on the profile settings page.

Tanya: Reviewed and approved Steve's login PR. Now working on the user preferences feature.

note: Four people, mix of done/in-progress/risk. No hard blocker but one risk to flag.
input:
Uma: Yesterday pushed the new search indexing service to staging. Running validation tests now. Found a minor Unicode character handling issue - should have a fix by noon.

Victor: Reviewed Uma's code. Left detailed comments. She's addressed most of them. Still outstanding: performance on large datasets.

Wendy: Started the search UI. Basic layout is done. Working on autocomplete next.

Xavier: QA on the legacy search is still ongoing. Down to 3 failing tests, should be clear by EOD.

done: Search indexing service pushed to staging
Code review of Uma's search indexing code
in_progress: Legacy search QA (3 failing tests remaining)

actions.task: Resolve search indexing performance on large datasets
